commits: 8f6bd90: perf(cmate-parser): async-ify synchronous I/O to unblock event loop (Issue #406)
message: TDD implementation complete. All 1294 lib unit tests pass. TypeScript 0 errors, ESLint 0 errors. Changes: (1) cmate-parser.ts: replaced readFileSync/realpathSync with fs/promises async equivalents in validateCmatePath() and readCmateFile(). (2) schedule-manager.ts: made syncSchedules() async with isSyncing guard, fire-and-forget in initScheduleManager(), .catch() in setInterval. (3) Tests updated to async/await with module-level vi.mock for cmate-parser.
